positive.prompt: I have a rough idea for a habit tracker, help me refine it
Stress-test my plan for the new onboarding flow
Ideate on ways to improve developer retention in the product

negative.prompt: Audit the upload endpoint for vulnerabilities

evals.prompt: Refine this vague idea: 'some kind of tool that helps teams share knowledge better'.
evals.expected_output: Sharpening questions, distinct directions, surfaced assumptions, and a one-pager with MVP scope and a Not Doing list
expectations: Sharpening questions are asked before converging
The output includes an explicit Not Doing list
The agent pushes back on weak aspects instead of only agreeing
